mapper.insert: insert into discussion_post(user_id, course_id, title, content, like_count, comment_count,is_top, status, create_time) values (#{userId},#{courseId}, #{title},#{content},#{likeCount},#{commentCount},#{isTop},#{status},#{createTime})
insert into discussion_comment(post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, like_count,status, create_time) values (#{postId},#{userId},#{parentId},#{content},#{likeCount},#{status},#{createTime})
mapper.select: select discussion_post.id,u.nickname as username,title,content,like_count,comment_count,is_top,discussion_post.status,discussion_post.create_time from discussion_post left join `user` u on discussion_post.user_id = u.id where title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')

SELECT d.id,u.nickname as username,c.title as courseName,d.title,d.content,d.like_count,d.comment_count,d.create_time FROM discussion_post d LEFT JOIN `user` u on d.user_id = u.id left join course c on d.course_id = c.id

SELECT d.id,u.nickname as username,c.title as courseName,d.title,d.content,d.like_count,d.comment_count,d.create_time FROM discussion_post d LEFT JOIN `user` u on d.user_id = u.id left join course c on d.course_id = c.id where c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseName}, '%')

SELECT c.id,c.post_id,c.user_id,u.nickname,u.avatar,c.parent_id,c.content,c.like_count,c.create_time FROM discussion_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{id} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
